news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Multi-Strategy Alternative ETF

overview.description: The First Trust Multi-Strategy Alternative ETF (LALT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that utilizes multiple alternative strategies in an attempt to provide lower correlation and more diversified risk exposures than traditional investments over various market cycles. LALT was launched on Jan 31, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Multi-Strategy Alternative ETF
